files.file: docs/reference-guides/slotfills/README.md — partial (one finding kept slightly demoted/promoted; see dispatch)
files.reason: The wp.plugins-vs-wp.editor finding was reported as severity=low by the reviewer; it is factually correct and was promoted to medium in dispatch because it actively misleads.

Reviewer suggested adding isNotAll to the operator table as a valid operator. Investigation shows isNotAll is in fact DEPRECATED since 7.0 (packages/dataviews/src/utils/filter-sort-and-paginate.ts lines 75-82 emit a deprecation warning and map it to isNone). The README's omission may be intentional. Documenting it as valid would regress the deprecation message.

invalidated_findings.evidence: isNotAll defined in types/field-api.ts and constants.ts.
invalidated_findings.note: INVALIDATED — isNotAll is deprecated. Doc omission is consistent with deprecation. If anything, doc could note the deprecation, but adding it as a normal operator (as the finding sketches) is wrong.
